recommendations.title: Foxy Brown
recommendations.overview: A voluptuous black woman takes a job as a high-class prostitute in order to get revenge on the mobsters who murdered her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Dead Heat
recommendations.genres: Horror, Science Fiction, Action, Thriller, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Detective Roger Mortis is killed in action while investigating a string of mysterious robberies: until he's brought back from the dead with a chemical company's secret re-animation technology. Now he has twelve hours to solve the case of his own deat

recommendations.title: Kamen Rider W Returns: Kamen Rider Accel
recommendations.overview: While settling into married life with Akiko, Ryu is brought into a case  involving a woman named Katsuragi Aoi, a member of a pickpocketing ring with most of her teammates murdered from unknown masked vigilantes that Ryu fought as Accel. As the detai

recommendations.title: Logorama
recommendations.overview: Two cops portrayed by Michelin Men chase an armed Ronald McDonald through the streets of a fictionalized, stylized city.
recommendations.director: Ludovic Houplain, François Alaux, Hervé de Crécy

recommendations.title: Mersal
recommendations.overview: A few individuals in the medical profession are murdered or kidnapped, and the cop investigating the case suspects a doctor and arrests him. But is he the one who is behind these crimes? And why are they being committed?

recommendations.title: Boy Kills World
recommendations.overview: When his family is murdered, a deaf-mute named Boy escapes to the jungle and is trained by a mysterious shaman to repress his childish imagination and become an instrument of death.

recommendations.title: Yes, Madam!
recommendations.overview: Two unlucky thieves break into a just murdered man's hotel room and steal his passport, with a hidden microfilm, wanted by a triad boss. Two ass-kicking women cops—one Chinese, one British—are on the case.

recommendations.title: Dhoom 3
recommendations.overview: To avenge his father's death, a circus entertainer trained in magic and acrobatics robs banks to take down a corrupt bank owner. Two cops from Mumbai are assigned to the case.

recommendations.title: Killing Daddy
recommendations.overview: When Cassie's father finds himself vulnerable and bedridden, she believes she has the perfect revenge for her mother's death.

recommendations.title: Restore Point
